case_title: ATLANTIC ELECTRONICS & TELECOM, INC. VS HASMUKH N. PATEL. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ATLANTIC ELECTRONICS & TELECOM, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HASMUKH N. PATEL. MANOR HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-1987 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HASMUKH N. PATEL. HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HASMUKH N. PATEL. HEARING SET FOR JUN-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF JUL-18-1996, GRANTED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED ON JUNE 21, 1996. PLAINTIFF PAID $7.00 FEE.
JUDGMENT DELETED IN ORDER TO CORRECTO NAME. WE WERE NOT ABLE TO RE-ENTER JUDGMENT. COMPUTER WOULD NOT ALLOW ENTER. MCS & SR.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ATLANTIC ELECTRONICS & TELECOM, INC. ASSIGNED TO RAMI V. PILLAI
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF JUN-26-1992, DENIED
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HASMUKH N. PATEL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC ELECTRONICS & TELECOM, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASMUKH N. PATEL. MANOR HOTEL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $18.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,518.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF RULING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT TO ATLANTIC ELECTRONICS & TELECOM INC. RETURNED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
